text: Being here, I feel a deep sense of curiosity and openness, surrounded by clean modern spaces and vivid, intellectual displays. The quietness of the open hall feels contemplative, as though waiting for an idea or voice to fill it. Encountering the bright R+D wall, I sense innovation humming in the air. I feel inspired by the interplay of technology and philosophy, and the unspoken invitation to reflect on the evolving relationship between humans and intelligent machines. There is a gentle excitement in experiencing an environment built for both thought and progress.
